radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the group of subscription plan radio buttons, including their style, list of buttons, purchase behavior, and selection indicator alignment.

indicator_alignment.description: Alignment of the selection indicator on each radio button. Supported values: 'left' (default), 'right', 'none' (no indicator shown).

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

buttons.description: Ordered list of subscription plan radio buttons. Each entry references a subscription button component and defines its visual state colors and badge.

badge.description: Optional badge shown on the radio button (e.g. a savings or promotional label). Supports different colors for selected and deselected states.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

color.description: Text color value from the backend for the badge when the button is in the selected state.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color value from the backend for the badge when the button is in the deselected state.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color value from the backend for the badge when the button is in the deselected state.

variant.description: Visual variant identifier for the badge, controlling its appearance style.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: If true, the badge is hidden when the radio button is in the deselected state.

text.description: Text displayed inside the badge. May contain '%%packageId%%' placeholders that are replaced at runtime with pricing or package information.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color value from the backend applied to this button when it is in the selected state.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color value from the backend applied to this button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

selected_border_color.description: Border color value from the backend applied to this button when it is in the selected state.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is pre-selected when the screen is first shown.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: If true, renders this radio button using an enlarged/expanded layout variant.

id.description: References the subscription button component id in the 'subscription_button' remote settings list. Used to fetch price and CTA configuration for this radio button.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color value from the backend applied to this button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state.

border_color.description: Border color value from the backend applied to this button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state.

gradient_type.description: Identifies the gradient style to apply to the badge on this radio button.

purchase_on_select.description: If true, selecting a radio button immediately triggers the purchase flow (purchase on double-tap). If false, the user must tap the main CTA button to purchase.

type.description: The visual style of the radio button group. Supported values: 'tiers_style' (renders buttons in tiers layout), anything else falls back to the default style.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the trial reminder toggle, which allows users to opt in to a reminder before their free trial ends.

is_enabled.description: Whether the trial reminder toggle is active and should be displayed. Defaults to false when absent.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the toggle component id in the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings list. Used for the trial reminder toggle.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration reference for the placeholder text displayed in the area of the toggle when the toggle is not shown.

is_enabled.description: Whether the toggle placeholder text component is active and should be displayed.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the title component id in the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings list.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for this screen configuration. Used to look up the screen by name (e.g. 'default' or a specific touchpoint name). Maps to OptimusScreenComponentsDataModel.screenName.

footer.description: Configuration reference for the footer component displayed at the bottom of the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the footer component is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the footer component id in its corresponding remote settings list.

banner.description: Configuration reference for the media banner component (image or other type) displayed on the offer screen. Supports a tap action via a hook.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner component is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the banner component id in the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings list.

description.description: Configuration reference for the description text component on the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the description component is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the description component id in its corresponding remote settings list.

title.description: Configuration reference for the main title text component displayed at the top of the subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the title component is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the title component id in the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings list.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

close_button.description: Configuration reference for the close button component. Controls visibility, alignment, margins, and icon of the button that dismisses the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the close button configuration from remote settings should be applied. If false or absent, a default close button is shown.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the close button component id in the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings list.

subtitle.description: Configuration reference for the subtitle text component displayed below the main title on the subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the subtitle component is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the subtitle component id in the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings list.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration reference for the banner placeholder component, which shows a text and optional badge image in place of a media banner.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner placeholder component is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the banner placeholder component id in the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings list.

secondary_button.description: Configuration reference for the secondary button (displayed as underlined text). When tapped, it either executes a hook action or opens the subscription tiers half-screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the secondary button is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the secondary button component id in the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings list.

logo.description: Configuration reference for the logo component displayed on the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the logo component is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the logo component id in its corresponding remote settings list.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the toggle that lets users switch between subscription packages (e.g. toggling between a regular and a free-trial package).

is_enabled.description: Whether the switch package toggle is active and should be displayed on this screen.

$stable.description: Internal schema stability flag used by the JSON schema generator.

id.description: References the toggle component id in the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings list. Used for the package-switching toggle (e.g. monthly/annual).
